user.title: Sifely Smart Lock
user.description: Enter your Sifely API credentials. Your Client ID and Client Secret can be obtained from the [Sifely API Access portal](https://app-smart-manager.sifely.com/Login.html).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your Client ID, username, and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Sifely API. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Sifely account is already configured.
